prompt: Establish a continuous improvement program for a PMO managing 20 projects.
assertions: implements PDCA cycles with defined cadence
creates improvement backlog from multiple sources
designs kaizen events for quick wins

prompt: Retrospectives have generated 45 improvement items over 6 months. Prioritize them.
assertions: categorizes items by domain and impact
identifies quick wins vs structural changes

prompt: Track improvement metrics showing cycle time reduced 20% but defect rate increased 15%.
assertions: analyzes correlation between speed and quality changes
identifies root cause of quality degradation
adjusts improvement targets to prevent gaming

prompt: Design a kaizen event to reduce meeting overhead from 40% to 25% of team time.
assertions: defines clear scope and success criteria
establishes measurement method for meeting time
